name: bgsd-oc
description: AI project planning and execution plugin for OpenCode — structured milestones, 40 slash commands, 9 specialized agents

scripts.test:fast: node --test --test-force-exit --test-concurrency=8 tests/state.test.cjs tests/plan.test.cjs tests/verify.test.cjs tests/infra.test.cjs tests/integration.test.cjs tests/contracts.test.cjs tests/plugin.test.cjs tests/orchestration.test.cjs tests/plugin-advisory-guardrails.test.cjs
scripts.test:slow: node --test --test-force-exit --test-concurrency=8 tests/codebase.test.cjs tests/memory.test.cjs tests/intent.test.cjs tests/worktree.test.cjs tests/env.test.cjs tests/trajectory.test.cjs tests/misc.test.cjs tests/init.test.cjs tests/agent.test.cjs
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:exports && npm run audit:circular && npm run audit:commands
